name: Addresses
description: Addressable structures for Walla Walla County. Derived from E911 addressing project in 1998. Alighne with 2002 aerial photography. Attributes include jurisdictional classification (ie, residence, mobile home, retail, manufacturing, etc). Note that the classifications of sites is the jurisdiction of the County of Walla Walla and is subject to change.
